## Meeting Purpose

[Interview Andre Webster for an Account Executive role.](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **Proven Autonomy:** At Cypress (\<50 employees), Andre built the go-to-market process for a new product from scratch, including outbound sequences, pricing, and demo scripts, with minimal support.
  - [**Strategic Impact:** Successfully increased the Average Selling Price (ASP) by testing higher quotes on enterprise deals, which led to a permanent price increase across multiple product lines.](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [**Platform-First Transition:** Profex is shifting from a services-only model to a platform company, launching an LLM visibility tool in December and a core content platform in Q1 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
  - [**Aggressive Growth Target:** The goal is to grow revenue from an expected $14M in 2025 to $50M in 2026, requiring significant investment in the go-to-market team.](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=2058.0)

## Topics

### Profex's Strategic Pivot to a Platform Company

  - [**Business Model Shift:** From a services-only agency to a platform company, a strategy funded by services revenue to de-risk product development.](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
  - [**New Product Launches:**](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
      - [**LLM Visibility Tool (Dec 2025):** Tracks brand ranking in LLM search to inform content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
      - [**Core Content Platform (Q1 2026):** An end-to-end tool for content generation and editing.](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
  - [**Go-to-Market Evolution:**](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
      - [**Dual Motion:** A self-serve, lower-ACV PLG motion for the LLM tool, alongside a high-touch, white-glove service offering.](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=2530.0)
      - [**Sales Focus:** Renewals are now handled by a new Account Management team, freeing sales reps for pure new business and upsells.](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=2096.0)
      - [**Comp Plan:** An uncapped, open-ended 3% commission on all closed deals, designed to maximize rep earning potential.](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=2258.0)

### Andre's Experience & Fit

  - **Cypress (\<50 employees):** Built the GTM process for a new UI/accessibility product from scratch, including:
      - [Outbound sequences & value statements.](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [Discovery questions & evaluation metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [Pricing strategy, leading to a permanent ASP increase.](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [**Twilio:** Developed technical API knowledge and advanced multi-threading skills by quarterbacking complex deals involving developers, marketing, legal, and security teams.](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [**Contentful:** Refined process and organization (e.g., time-blocking) and improved outbound creativity (e.g., using GIFs in emails) based on manager feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [**Self-Described Superpower:** Confidence in the product and ability to educate buyers, making the decision to purchase feel like a "no-brainer."](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bridget:** Discuss the interview with Tyler and Tucker.](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=2714.0)
  - [**Andre:** Prepare a presentation/pitch for the final round, which will include Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=2714.0)
      - [**Focus:** Demonstrate marketing expertise and an understanding of LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=2718.0)
      - [**Tip:** Prepare an energetic pitch to match Marcel's style.](https://fathom.video/share/udxjtFQ7nHUTPc-Up9bjA1QRdYLB-sUR?tab=summary&timestamp=2718.0)
